---
title: "Untitled"
output: pdf_document
date: "2026-01-04"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(agricolae)
```

## setting the parameters
### No of treatment

```{r treatment no}
trt<-1:400
t <- length(trt)
```

### Size  of block k

```{r block size}
k<-8
```

### No. of block s

```{r block no.}
s<-t/k
```

### No. of replication r

```{r replication}
r <- 3
```

### Shuffle and use alpha design to determine the blocking

```{r alpha design}
outdesign <- design.alpha(trt, k, r, serie=3, randomization = FALSE)
```

### Abstracting the info we need

```{r abstract}
book<-outdesign$book
plots<-book[,4]
```

### Change the data into matrix

```{r convert}
dim(plots)<-c(k,s,r)
for (i in 1:r) print(t(plots[,,i]))
```
